summary: Comprehensive testing of GHF Agency event website MVP. Backend API testing achieved 73.3% success rate with critical contests bug fixed. Frontend testing confirmed premium design, authentication flow, and core functionality working. Fixed datetime comparison bug in contests endpoint.

critical_bugs.issue: TypeError: can't compare offset-naive and offset-aware datetimes
critical_bugs.impact: Contests endpoint returning 500 error, blocking contest functionality
critical_bugs.fix_details: Fixed datetime comparison logic in get_contests function to handle timezone-aware vs timezone-naive datetime objects

minor_issues.issue: Admin authentication not working properly with Bearer token
minor_issues.impact: Admin stats endpoint returns 403 instead of 200

minor_issues.issue: Root API endpoint doesn't return expected status field
minor_issues.impact: Health check test fails, but API is functional

ui_bugs.issue: Splash screen data-testid not found during testing
ui_bugs.note: Splash screen is functional but may need correct data-testid attribute

ui_bugs.issue: Booking form elements not found with expected selectors
ui_bugs.note: Page may be loading but form elements need proper data-testid attributes

integration_issues.issue: Some pages showing splash screen instead of content
integration_issues.note: May be related to React routing or authentication state management

passed_tests: Hero section with premium dark + rose neon + gold design
Responsive design on mobile and tablet

high_priority: Fix admin stats endpoint authentication - Bearer token not being recognized properly
Add proper data-testid attributes to booking form elements for better testability
Investigate page routing issues causing splash screen to appear on protected pages
medium_priority: Add data-testid to splash screen component
Verify booking page form functionality and ensure proper loading
low_priority: Add status field to root API endpoint for better health checks
Improve error handling for edge cases in datetime comparisons
